entity: Alaska Oil and Gas Conservation Commission

entity_evidence.text: The amount appropriated by this appropriation includes the unexpended and unobligated balance on June 30, 2025, of the Alaska Oil and Gas Conservation Commission receipts account for regulatory cost charges collected under AS 31.05.093.
